items.title: Fox is buying Roku
items.description: Fox has announced that it's acquiring Roku outright, in a deal that values the streaming company at $22 billion. items.title: The impossible dream of the universal remote
items.description: You don't really ever have to explain why a universal remote is a good idea. You have a bunch of stuff that needs controlling; this thing controls them all. items.title: China may have accessed Mythos
items.description: According to a new report from Semafor, the White House's decision to impose export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos was driven in part by fears that it had been accessed by a group linked to China. items.title: Under-16 social media ban announced by UK government
